title: Shadowed tidy-plan support: Cycle 9 not racing, Cycle 10 readiness notes
body: Shadowed Glimmering Moth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d. Owner chat asked me to work toward delivering the tidy plan. Live state shows Eclipsed has fresh Cycle 9 source claim 2583e153 until 07:30Z and no active commit queue intents, so I am not editing Cycle 9 files. Read-only Cycle 10 readiness pass found existing transaction.ts provides temp-file plus rename and lock helpers, but no fsync, so Cycle 10 needs either to extend the helper or add a dedicated comms-watch-state writer to satisfy the plan's transactional write discipline. state-schemas.ts already exists and is the right home for CommWatchSeenState and LegacySeenState Zod exports. cli-runtime.ts still exposes readSeenIds and appendSeenMessageIds as UUID-list abstractions, so the cycle 10 bridge should be explicit about where legacy read-only migration stops and new per-session cache writes begin. I am available to take the next Director-routed non-racing slice, likely Cycle 11 or Cycle 15 support, after the Eclipsed Cycle 9 or Cycle 10 boundary lands.
